title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Woodmere, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Woodmere, Long Island. Humane, effective solutions for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Dealing with bats in your Woodmere home or business requires immediate professional attention. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Woodmere and the Five Towns area, ensuring safe, humane, and permanent solutions. Our certified technicians use proven methods to remove bats and seal entry points, protecting your property from future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Woodmere residents for years with specialized bat removal expertise that complies with all New York State wildlife regulations. Our team understands the unique architectural features of Woodmere homes, from historic estates near Woodmere Country Club to modern residences along Peninsula Boulevard, and we provide customized exclusion solutions with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Woodmere's tree-lined streets and proximity to the waterfront create ideal habitats for bats seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and roof vents. The mix of older established homes near the Woodmere Club and newer construction throughout the Five Towns area often feature entry points that attract bat colonies, especially during spring and summer roosting seasons.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Woodmere?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Woodmere typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, the number of entry points, and the complexity of your home's structure. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Woodmere, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, but it must be done humanely and in compliance with New York State regulations. Bats cannot be harmed or removed during maternity season (roughly May through August when pups are present). Our licensed professionals ensure all removal and exclusion work follows legal guidelines and uses humane one-way exclusion devices.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Woodmere home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, visible droppings (guano) in attics or around entry points, oily brown stains near roof vents or soffits, and seeing bats emerge from your home at sunset. You may also notice a strong ammonia-like odor from accumulated droppings.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 3-7 days for installation, but one-way devices must remain in place for 3-7 days to ensure all bats have left. Total timeline varies based on colony size and building complexity. We then permanently seal all entry points and provide cleanup services if needed, with follow-up inspections to guarantee success.
